Structs/TrustPinConfiguration.html#/s:11.name: publicKey
Structs/TrustPinConfiguration.html#/s:11.abstract: Base64-encoded public key used to verify the pinning payload.

Structs/TrustPinConfiguration.html#/s:11.name: mode
Structs/TrustPinConfiguration.html#/s:11.abstract: Behaviour for domains that are not in the pinning configuration.

Structs/TrustPinConfiguration.html#/s:11.name: configurationURL
Structs/TrustPinConfiguration.html#/s:11.abstract: Optional custom URL for the pinning payload. Leave nil to use the default source.

Enums/TrustPinMode.html#/s:11TrustPinKit.name: strict
Enums/TrustPinMode.html#/s:11TrustPinKit.abstract: Reject any connection to a domain that is not in the pinning configuration.

Enums/TrustPinMode.html#/s:11TrustPinKit.name: permissive
Enums/TrustPinMode.html#/s:11TrustPinKit.abstract: Pin the domains that are configured and allow others to proceed unchecked.

Enums/TrustPinErrors.html#/s:11TrustPinK.name: invalidProjectConfig
Enums/TrustPinErrors.html#/s:11TrustPinK.abstract: The setup parameters are invalid (missing, malformed, or rejected during validation).

Enums/TrustPinErrors.html#/s:11TrustPinK.name: errorFetchingPinningInfo
Enums/TrustPinErrors.html#/s:11TrustPinK.abstract: The pinning configuration could not be retrieved.

Enums/TrustPinErrors.html#/s:11TrustPinK.name: invalidServerCert
Enums/TrustPinErrors.html#/s:11TrustPinK.abstract: The server certificate is missing, malformed, or could not be parsed as X.509.

Enums/TrustPinErrors.html#/s:11TrustPinK.name: pinsMismatch
Enums/TrustPinErrors.html#/s:11TrustPinK.abstract: The presented certificate does not match any configured pin for the domain.

Enums/TrustPinErrors.html#/s:11TrustPinK.name: allPinsExpired
Enums/TrustPinErrors.html#/s:11TrustPinK.abstract: All pins configured for the domain have expired.

Enums/TrustPinErrors.html#/s:11TrustPinK.name: domainNotRegistered
Enums/TrustPinErrors.html#/s:11TrustPinK.abstract: The domain is not registered for pinning.

Enums/TrustPinLogLevel.html.abstract: Severity level controlling which TrustPin log messages are emitted.

Enums/TrustPinMode.html.name: TrustPinMode
Enums/TrustPinMode.html.abstract: Controls how TrustPin handles domains that are not configured for pinning.
